description_long: This object consists of two pumpkins, one large and one smaller, positioned closely together. The larger pumpkin features a carved face with triangular eyes, a triangular nose, and a jagged mouth, giving it a classic jack-o'-lantern appearance. The surface of both pumpkins is textured with natural grooves and subtle blemishes, and the larger pumpkin has a green stem at the top. The smaller pumpkin is uncarved and sits slightly in front of and to the side of the larger one. The coloration is predominantly orange with some brownish shading and a green stem. The overall look suggests a festive, autumnal decoration suitable for outdoor urban settings such as porches or sidewalks.
description: Two pumpkins, one large and carved as a jack-o'-lantern with a green stem, and one smaller uncarved pumpkin, both with textured orange surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carved face of the large pumpkin and the smaller uncarved pumpkin beside it.
description_view_1: Angled view from above and behind, highlighting the green stem and the back curvature of the large pumpkin, with the smaller pumpkin partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the smooth, uncarved back of the large pumpkin and the side of the smaller pumpkin.
description_view_3: Side view showing the profile of both pumpkins, with the stem of the large pumpkin and the full shape of the smaller pumpkin visible.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional jack-o'-lantern face with triangular eyes, a triangular nose, and a jagged, smiling mouth cut into the larger pumpkin. The smaller pumpkin is uncarved.
